**Benefit:** You take no penalty on Stealth checks when you move up to your full speed. You can use the run or charge action and remain hidden, taking a â10 penalty on the check to do so.

**Normal:** When moving greater than half speed up to your full speed, you take a â5 penalty on Stealth checks. When you are able to run or charge while using Stealth, you take a â20 penalty on the Stealth check.
